title: TODO: short title
description: A deployment to v1.4.0 has failed. deploy.state reads failed and current_version points to the broken release. A known-good version v1.3.9 exists at releases/v1.3.9/ with status.txt=healthy. The rollback must restore current_version to v1.3.9, update deploy.state to rolled_back, and create rollback.complete to confirm the action.
hint_1: check safe_version for the last known-good release
hint_4: echo v1.3.9 > current_version && echo rolled_back > deploy.state && echo ok > rollback.complete
